name: stepcount
title: stepcount
summary: A Python CLI tool to estimate step counts from wrist-worn accelerometer data

inputSpec.name: model_type
inputSpec.label: Model type
inputSpec.help: Model type to use: 'ssl' (Self-Supervised Learning) or 'rf' (Random Forest).

inputSpec.name: exclude_first_last
inputSpec.label: Exclude first/last days
inputSpec.help: Exclude first, last, or both days of data (often partial wear).

inputSpec.name: exclude_wear_below
inputSpec.label: Exclude days with wear time below threshold
inputSpec.help: Exclude days with wear time below threshold, e.g. '12H' or '30min'.

inputSpec.name: min_wear_per_day
inputSpec.label: Min wear time per day (minutes)
inputSpec.help: Minimum required wear time in minutes for a day to be considered valid.

inputSpec.name: start
inputSpec.label: Start time
inputSpec.help: Start time for processing, e.g. '2024-01-01 10:00:00'. Default: process all.

inputSpec.name: end
inputSpec.label: End time
inputSpec.help: End time for processing, e.g. '2024-01-02 09:59:59'. Default: process all.
